rec: Most affordable D2 in Los Angeles. Kinesiology is a flagship department. LA internship access for PT/Chiro is extraordinary. Best for Olivier if budget is the primary constraint.

name: St. Edward's
titles: LSC Coach of Year for Diego Bocanegra

notable: Austin FC USL2 affiliate (Austin Bold FC) — direct pipeline
proPlayers.draftRank: Developing pipeline; Austin FC connection unique advantage

degreeTitle: B.S. in Kinesiology
acuAlignNote: Good core coverage — anatomy, physiology, biomechanics, exercise prescription all present. Austin's booming health sector and Dell Medical School proximity make clinical hour access excellent.

gpa.note: St. Edward's is accessible. Athletic + merit aid stacks well at GPA 3.0+; 2.8 still eligible for athletic only.

fin.internationalNote: St. Edward's Holy Cross mission scholarship stacks with athletic. Moderate cost + strong aid = good value. Austin lifestyle premium worth it.

culture.vibe: Small, friendly Austin campus with an artistic, creative vibe. St. Edward's sits on a hill overlooking downtown Austin — the views are stunning and you can walk to Congress Avenue. Austin's culture bleeds onto campus constantly.
culture.thingsToDo: Sixth Street live music, Austin City Limits Music Festival, SXSW, Barton Springs swimming hole, Lady Bird Lake kayaking, Rainey Street bars, South Congress boutiques, UT Longhorns games nearby, Austin FC soccer at Q2 Stadium. Austin is the most fun city in Texas.
culture.socialScene: Inclusive, creative, liberal. St. Edward's Holy Cross mission creates a welcoming community. Austin's tech and creative industries attract ambitious students. International students welcome. Warm 10 months of the year.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★★★ Austin is one of America's most exciting cities and growing fastest. St. Edward's intimate campus with Austin's city on your doorstep is a compelling package. Live music capital of the world. Excellent lifestyle match.

facilityDetails.stadium: Butler Sports Complex — FieldTurf, 1,500 capacity, permanent lighting. Located on the St. Edward's hilltop campus with views over downtown Austin. LSC D2 standard.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 2 training fields at Butler Complex. FieldTurf surfaces. Stunning views of Austin skyline. Year-round Texas warmth — outdoor training 11 months annually.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: St. Edward's University Athletics Performance Center — 8,000 sq ft, rebuilt 2021. Olympic lifting platforms, Keiser resistance equipment, cable systems. Recovery suite with normatec and contrast baths. Diego Bocanegra has invested in sports science integration since his arrival.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: GPS tracking (Statsports) for all sessions. Video analysis (Hudl) with individual player dashboards. Austin Bold FC (USL2 affiliate) shares some analytics infrastructure with St. Edward's soccer program — unique D2 partnership.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: St. Edward's Athletics certified athletic trainer. Dell Medical School (UT Austin affiliated, 10 min drive) sports medicine partnership. Dell Medical is one of the newest and most innovative medical schools in the USA — sports medicine access is cutting-edge.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: SEU Department of Kinesiology: exercise physiology lab, biomechanics teaching lab. Dell Medical School proximity gives motivated pre-PT students extraordinary clinical exposure — UT Austin Kinesiology faculty occasionally guest lecture at SEU.
facilityDetails.extras: Q2 Stadium (Austin FC MLS — 10 min drive). Barton Springs Pool (5 min). Lady Bird Lake kayaking (10 min). Sixth Street live music (15 min). South Congress (10 min). Austin City Limits Music Festival and SXSW both walk/rideshare distance. Most vibrant city environment of any D2 school in the guide.
facilityDetails.note: SEU's facilities are modest but the Austin FC professional pipeline, Dell Medical School access, and Bocanegra's analytics integration via Austin Bold give this D2 program a professional culture that punches above its facilities weight. Austin itself is the facility that matters most here.

coach.name: Diego Bocanegra
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Austin native. Former USL pro. LSC Coach of Year. European-style pressing system well-suited to an 8/10 midfielder.

rec: Austin is one of USA's fastest-growing cities. Possession system suits an 8/10. Small campus = personal development. Austin FC pipeline is a real professional pathway. Dell Medical School nearby for clinical placements.

name: Oklahoma City

notable: Australian player placement into professional environments (A-League/NPL)
proPlayers.draftRank: NAIA level — USL/international pathway

degreeTitle: B.S. in Kinesiology (Exercise Science)
acuAlignNote: Good core coverage for NAIA level. Pre-PT seminar built in. Brian Finnegan has explicitly placed Australian players in professional environments including the A-League pathway.

gpa.note: OCU is an NAIA school — very flexible GPA requirements. Athletic scholarship is primary driver.

fin.internationalNote: NAIA has NO maximum scholarship cap — full athletic ride possible. OCU Christian mission aid adds further. Best scholarship value for Australian player.

culture.vibe: Faith-based city campus with a passionate performing arts culture. OCU is famous for its dance, musical theatre, and arts programs — the energy on campus is creative and performative. The soccer program brings a hard-working athletic culture to balance the arts.
culture.thingsToDo: Bricktown entertainment district (walkable), Paycom Center (Thunder NBA — one of NBA's best atmospheres), Scissortail Park, Oklahoma City National Memorial, Lake Hefner, Will Rogers Park. OKC is more interesting than its reputation suggests.
culture.socialScene: Warm Christian community culture. Smaller international community but welcoming. Oklahoma City has grown significantly — food scene, arts scene, and NBA culture have transformed it. Brian Finnegan's Australian connections mean you'll be less alone.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★ OKC is not Sydney. But it's a real city, the Thunder culture is extraordinary, Brian Finnegan's Australian connections are unique, and the NAIA scholarship flexibility is the best in the guide. Functional rather than glamorous.

facilityDetails.stadium: OCU Soccer Field — natural grass, 1,000 capacity, permanent lighting. NAIA SAC standard. Simple, functional, well-maintained.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 2 practice fields on OCU campus. Natural grass. NAIA training standard — functional and adequate.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: OCU Freede Center Athletic Weight Room — 7,000 sq ft. Free weights, Olympic platforms, cable systems. Adequate for NAIA level. S&C programming available through the athletics department.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: GPS tracking (basic Polar team system). Video analysis (Hudl). OCU's Kinesiology program has exercise physiology and biomechanics teaching labs. Less sophisticated than D1/D2 schools but adequate for foundational exercise science education.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: OCU Athletics certified athletic trainer. Mercy Hospital Oklahoma City sports medicine partnership. Oklahoma City Thunder use the same Mercy Hospital network — Brian Finnegan has occasionally facilitated player access to Thunder performance staff through his local connections.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: OCU Division of Kinesiology: exercise physiology lab, anatomy lab. Oklahoma City University performing arts facilities (world-renowned) accessible for all students. Oklahoma City's growing healthcare sector provides clinical observation opportunities for pre-PT students.
facilityDetails.extras: Paycom Center (OKC Thunder NBA) — one of the best arena atmospheres in the NBA — 10 minutes from campus. Scissortail Park. Bricktown entertainment district. Oklahoma City arts district (Paseo). Brian Finnegan's Australian connections mean new international students have a local support network from day one.
facilityDetails.note: OCU's facilities are functional NAIA standard — not impressive on paper. But the NAIA scholarship flexibility (no cap), Brian Finnegan's Australian professional network, and Oklahoma City's improving city environment make this a strong overall package for the right player.

coach.name: Brian Finnegan
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Multiple NAIA national tournament appearances. Known for nurturing Australian and UK players. Technical, attacking style. Explicit Australian player track record.

rec: Most competitive NAIA program in guide. OKC is a real city. Generous scholarships. Brian Finnegan has Australian connections and has placed Australian players in professional environments — unique advantage for Olivier.

name: Keiser
titles: Health sciences institution — academic titles prominent

notable: Strong placement into clinical and health science roles in South Florida
proPlayers.draftRank: Not a pro soccer pipeline — choose for academic/PT pathway

degreeTitle: B.S. in Exercise Science
acuAlignNote: Good clinical integration for NAIA level — Clinical Simulation Centre provides hands-on patient experience rare at undergraduate level. Directly relevant to DPT applications.

gpa.note: Keiser health sciences university — flexible entry. Focuses on student commitment over GPA.

fin.internationalNote: NAIA full ride possible. Keiser clinical science scholarships available for health-track students. Strong package for the right student.

culture.vibe: Health-sciences-first campus culture — clinical, professional, and purposeful. Keiser attracts students who know exactly what career they want. Campus social life is moderate but Fort Lauderdale is an excellent lifestyle city outside the gates.
culture.thingsToDo: Fort Lauderdale beach, Las Olas Boulevard, Wilton Manors entertainment district, Miami (30 min), Everglades, Palm Beach (45 min), Port Everglades cruise terminal. Fort Lauderdale is excellent for outdoor and waterfront activities.
culture.socialScene: Professional and career-focused culture. Students respect each other's clinical ambitions. Less social than a typical university but the Fort Lauderdale environment makes up for it. International students present in health science programs.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★ Keiser is functionally excellent for PT pathway but limited campus culture. Fort Lauderdale lifestyle is great. Best if Olivier's priority is maximising clinical hours and academic preparation over social campus experience.

facilityDetails.stadium: Keiser University Soccer Complex — FieldTurf, 1,200 capacity, lights. Fort Lauderdale location. Sun Conference NAIA standard.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 2 FieldTurf practice fields on Keiser campus. Year-round Fort Lauderdale climate — ideal training environment.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: Keiser Athletics Performance Center — 7,000 sq ft, well-equipped for NAIA. Olympic platforms, free weights, cable systems. Sports science programming through Keiser's health sciences faculty — the depth of clinical knowledge on staff is the differentiator.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: GPS tracking for sessions. Video analysis (Hudl). Keiser's clinical simulation labs — normally reserved for health science clinical training — are occasionally accessible to soccer athletes for performance testing.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: Keiser Athletics certified athletic trainer. Broward Health sports medicine partnership. Keiser's own health sciences faculty (including exercise physiology and anatomy professors) provide an unusually deep sports medicine advisory support structure for NAIA level.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: Keiser Clinical Simulation Centre — the standout facility. Features: high-fidelity patient simulation mannequins (including respiratory and cardiac scenarios), anatomy lab (preserved cadavers — rare at NAIA level), clinical nursing suites, rehabilitation simulation rooms. Pre-PT students get hands-on patient simulation experience before entering graduate school — unavailable at most US undergraduate programs.
facilityDetails.extras: Fort Lauderdale beach (15 min). Las Olas Boulevard. Broward Center for the Performing Arts. Miami 30 min. NAIA's flexible schedule (fewer travel days than D1/D2) means more time for clinical observation and study.
facilityDetails.note: Keiser's standout differentiator is the Clinical Simulation Centre — cadaver anatomy lab and patient simulation at NAIA level is genuinely rare. For a student targeting DPT or Chiropractic, this hands-on pre-graduate experience is more valuable than a bigger weight room.

coach.name: TBD
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Health sciences university — program reflects that ethos. Sports science integrated with coaching.

rec: Keiser is fundamentally a health sciences university. Fort Lauderdale warm and cosmopolitan. Clinical Simulation Centre provides patient care experience before grad school. Best if academics are the priority over professional soccer.

name: Chapman

notable: Primary value: GPA platform for PT/Chiro grad school
proPlayers.draftRank: D3 — academic pathway program

degreeTitle: B.S. in Kinesiology (Pre-Physical Therapy track)
acuAlignNote: Good alignment — explicit Pre-PT track with KIN 405 Pre-Physical Therapy Prep as required course. Orange County clinical network (Hoag Hospital, CHOC) is very strong for DPT applications.

gpa.note: Chapman is selective for D3. No athletic scholarships. GPA 2.8 is likely below typical admitted student.

fin.internationalNote: D3 — NO athletic scholarships. Merit and need-based aid only. Chapman Provost Scholarship for 3.75+ GPA. Net cost can be reduced but full coverage unlikely without very strong financial need.

culture.vibe: Small, creative, film-industry-adjacent Orange County campus. Chapman is known for its film school (Dodge College of Film) and arts culture — creative energy is everywhere. Orange is a charming historic town and the campus is beautiful.
culture.thingsToDo: Disneyland (10 min — literally), Old Towne Orange antique district, Newport Beach and Laguna Beach (30 min), Irvine Spectrum, Angel Stadium, LA day trips (45 min), hiking in Cleveland National Forest. Orange County is extremely liveable.
culture.socialScene: Welcoming, creative, affluent. Many students are from wealthy California families. International students present. Small campus means strong personal connections. Film/arts culture dominates social identity.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★★ Orange County has Sydney-level weather and great beach access. Chapman's creative culture is engaging. D3 means less schedule intensity — more time for beach, arts, and GPA building. Disneyland proximity is ridiculous.

facilityDetails.stadium: Griset Field — 1,000 capacity, natural grass, floodlit. Beautiful Orange County setting within the Chapman campus. SCIAC D3 standard.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: 2 training fields at Chapman Athletic Complex. Natural grass. OC climate allows outdoor training almost year-round.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: Chapman University Sandhu Conference Center Athletic Weight Room — 9,000 sq ft, high quality for D3. Full free weight section, Olympic platforms, functional training zone. Olympic sports get excellent support at Chapman despite D3 status.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: GPS tracking (Statsports) — unusual for D3. Video analysis (Hudl). Chapman's kinesiology department has dedicated sports science resources including: force plate, body composition analysis (BodPod), and reactive strength testing.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: Chapman Athletics certified athletic trainer. Hoag Hospital Newport Beach sports medicine partnership — Hoag is ranked #1 hospital in Orange County. Pre-PT students at Chapman have formal Hoag Hospital clinical observation placement through KIN 405 Pre-Physical Therapy Prep course.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: Chapman Kinesiology Department: anatomy lab (cadaver access — rare at D3 level), biomechanics lab (3D motion capture, force plates — exceptional for D3), exercise physiology lab, motor behaviour lab. KIN 405 Pre-PT Prep course is a formal required course that integrates Hoag Hospital observation with academic preparation.
facilityDetails.extras: Disneyland (10 min — literally). Disneyland and Knott's Berry Farm both walkable on busy weekends. Laguna Beach (30 min). Newport Beach (25 min). Old Towne Orange antique district (5 min walk). Chapman film school creates vibrant creative campus energy.
facilityDetails.note: Chapman punches significantly above its D3 weight in academic lab quality. 3D motion capture, cadaver access, and force plates at D3 level are exceptional. The Hoag Hospital KIN 405 clinical placement is the most structured pre-PT academic program in any D3 school in this guide.

coach.name: Dustin Johnson
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: SCIAC experienced. Academic support strong. Playing time guaranteed from year 1.

rec: Chapman has an explicit Pre-PT required course. Orange County is 30 min from LA. D3 = less schedule pressure — better for building GPA toward PT grad school. No athletic scholarships. Best if long-term academic career is the priority.

name: Santa Monica
titles: Outstanding transfer record to D1 programs

notable: Transfer to UCLA then MLS draft is a proven pathway
JUCO value = stepping stone to D1 MLS-producing programs
proPlayers.draftRank: JUCO — value is pathway program to D1

degreeTitle: A.A./A.S. in Kinesiology (2-year transfer degree)
acuAlignNote: 2-year degree. IGETC transfer curriculum covers biology, chemistry, anatomy basics. After transfer to UCLA/UCSB, full alignment achieved. Not a terminal degree — value is the transfer pipeline.

gpa.note: Santa Monica College has open enrolment — zero GPA requirement. Best if needing to rebuild academic record.

fin.internationalNote: JUCO — minimal cost. California College Promise Grant covers tuition for eligible students. Athletic grants available. Most affordable option to build GPA for transfer.

culture.vibe: Community college culture — diverse, no-nonsense, goal-oriented. Santa Monica College is famous for transfer students who are serious about getting to UCLA or another UC. The campus is workmanlike but Santa Monica itself is extraordinary.
culture.thingsToDo: Santa Monica Pier and beach (literally adjacent to campus), Venice Beach boardwalk (2km), Third Street Promenade shopping, Abbot Kinney Boulevard, LA access via Metro, Santa Monica Mountains hiking. Campus is 100m from the Pacific Ocean.
culture.socialScene: Extremely diverse — ages, nationalities, backgrounds. No campus residential culture — students come, learn, and go to the beach. Transfer focus means peers are academically motivated. Very accepting and unpretentious.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★★★ Santa Monica is arguably the most Sydney-like location in America. Ocean, surf culture, warm year-round, diverse, laid-back. For a 2-year stay while building GPA, the lifestyle is extraordinary. Campus culture is secondary to location culture.

facilityDetails.stadium: Corsair Field — SMC natural grass facility for JUCO soccer. CCCAA standard. Simple, functional.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: Practice fields on the Santa Monica College campus. Year-round beach climate. 100m from the Pacific Ocean.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: SMC Athletics Fitness Center — adequate JUCO weight room. Free weights, cables, basic machines. Santa Monica's proximity to world-class commercial gyms (Equinox, Gold's Gym Venice) means motivated athletes supplement easily.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: Basic JUCO level. Video analysis available. SMC's Kinesiology Department has teaching labs for physiology and anatomy — good for foundational learning.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: SMC Athletic Trainer on staff. Providence Saint John's Health Center (Santa Monica) sports medicine partnership. Excellent access for a JUCO program.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: SMC Kinesiology Department: anatomy and physiology teaching labs, computer exercise physiology suite. UCLA's transfer pathway means students who thrive at SMC often access UCLA's world-class labs from Year 3 — the JUCO → UCLA lab upgrade is significant.
facilityDetails.extras: Santa Monica Beach (100m from campus — not a typo). Venice Beach boardwalk (2km). Third Street Promenade. Santa Monica Pier. Entire LA accessible by Metro Expo Line from campus. Google, Apple, and major tech campuses in Santa Monica for career networking. The best JUCO location in America.
facilityDetails.note: SMC's own facilities are JUCO standard — functional, not impressive. The differentiator is location: 100m from one of the world's great beaches, Metro access to all of LA, and a proven pipeline to UCLA where the facilities become elite. Think of this as 2 years at the beach before upgrading to a top-10 facility.

coach.name: Lee Avery
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: Experienced CCCAA coach. Strong relationship with UCLA transfer advisors. Known for placing players at 4-year D1/D2 schools.

rec: THE best JUCO option for Sydney lifestyle match. Santa Monica is the most Sydney-like location in America. Best transfer record to UCLA in California. 2 years at ~$9k to prove GPA and soccer ability, then step up.

name: Miami Dade

notable: Transfer to Barry (D2 4 national titles) is the primary pro pathway
proPlayers.draftRank: JUCO — pathway program

degreeTitle: A.A. in Health Sciences (2-year transfer degree)
acuAlignNote: 2-year intro. Value is the transfer pipeline into Barry, FIU, or UM. Barry has HPS 450 Pre-PT Seminar — that is the target after MDC.

gpa.note: Miami Dade has open enrolment. Zero GPA barrier. Transfer into Barry/FIU after 2 years with stronger record.

fin.internationalNote: JUCO — very low cost. Florida residency discounts may apply after 1 year. Transfer pathway to Barry or FIU is the value proposition.

culture.vibe: Massive urban community college — functional, diverse, and Miami-flavoured. MDC is one of the largest colleges in America with 6 campuses across Miami. The culture is pure Miami — Latin, energetic, and aspirational.
culture.thingsToDo: All of Miami — see FIU above. South Beach, Wynwood, Little Havana, Calle Ocho, Miami Heat, Marlins, Inter Miami CF. Miami Dade campuses are embedded in different Miami neighbourhoods each with distinct culture.
culture.socialScene: Extremely diverse — one of the most diverse institutions in the USA. Spanish widely spoken. Commuter culture means limited residential social life but Miami compensates entirely. Transfer pathway to Barry or FIU is the social upgrade.
culture.olivierMatch: ★★★★ Miami lifestyle is excellent. MDC itself has limited campus culture but Miami provides everything. Best framed as 2 years in Miami building your record, then transferring to a residential campus.
culture.lifestyleTags: Miami energy, commuter culture, transfer pathway

facilityDetails.stadium: MDC Soccer Fields — Miami Dade College North Campus athletic facilities. NJCAA standard. Miami FL location.
facilityDetails.trainingFields: Practice fields on MDC North Campus. Year-round Miami climate. Fully outdoor training 12 months annually.
facilityDetails.strengthConditioning: MDC Athletics Weight Room — adequate JUCO standard. Free weights, cable machines. Miami's proximity to professional training facilities means motivated students can access more sophisticated environments.
facilityDetails.sportsScience: Basic JUCO level. Video analysis. MDC Health Sciences campus has basic kinesiology teaching labs.
facilityDetails.sportsMed: MDC Athletic Trainer. Jackson Memorial Hospital (Level 1 trauma centre, top academic medical centre in Florida) is accessible via public transit from campus. Inter Miami CF stadium is visible from the MDC Health Sciences campus.
facilityDetails.academicLabs: MDC Health Sciences: anatomy lab, physiology teaching labs. MDC's proximity to UM Health and Jackson Memorial provides motivated pre-health students extraordinary clinical observation access as a community member of Miami.
facilityDetails.extras: All of Miami — South Beach, Wynwood, Little Havana, Brickell. Inter Miami CF (Chase Stadium) 10 min from health sciences campus. Miami Heat (Kaseya Center) 15 min. No other JUCO in the USA is embedded in a city of this global calibre.
facilityDetails.note: MDC's own facilities are basic JUCO standard. Miami is the facility — proximity to Jackson Memorial for clinical access, Inter Miami for professional soccer exposure, and UM Health for pre-PT pathway development means motivated students can build extraordinary CVs in 2 years.

coach.name: TBD
coach.title: Head Coach
coach.profile: NJCAA. Transfer connections to FIU, Barry. Miami community ties.

rec: Miami gateway to South Florida 4-year ecosystem. Transfer into Barry for kinesiology degree and pre-PT seminar. Warm city, massive international student body.
